safetyZones.notes: Popular with IT crowd. Lots of cafes, restaurants, PGs. Well-lit main roads. Inner lanes can be dark after 11 PM.
Upscale area. 100 Feet Road is lively till late. Generally safe for solo travelers. Good pub scene.
IT hub with lots of tech parks. ITPL area is well-patrolled. Some surrounding areas are underdeveloped.
Major IT corridor. Hosur Road traffic is legendary. After work hours, some stretches feel deserted.
Central commercial area. Busy during the day. Bar crowds at night — generally safe but stay aware.
Major bus and railway hub. Very crowded and chaotic. Pickpocketing risk. Avoid walking around at night.
Airport is modern and well-secured. Use Ola/Uber or BMTC Vayu Vajra buses. Pre-booked cabs available.
Well-planned residential area popular with young professionals. Lots of food options. Generally safe.
Old residential area, family-friendly. 4th Block shopping complex is a landmark. Very safe.
Wholesale flower and fruit market. Extremely crowded. Great experience but guard your belongings. Not for night visits.

fareBenchmarks.notes: 40-90 min depending on traffic. Ola/Uber 800-1000. Airport Meru 1000-1300. Traffic on Bellary Road is unpredictable.
35-70 min. Outer Ring Road route is usually better than going through the city.
40-80 min. Also consider Vayu Vajra bus (₹250, ~90 min) if not in a rush.
30-60 min via Outer Ring Road. Rush hour makes this a nightmare — allow 90 min.
Meter: ₹30 for first 2 km, ₹15/km after. Most drivers use meters in Bangalore (unlike Delhi). Use Ola Auto for fair pricing.
Purple and Green lines. Limited coverage but very clean and fast. MG Road, Indiranagar, Whitefield are connected.

scamAlerts.description: Random taxi touts at the airport quote ₹2000+ for city center. Use the official Ola/Uber pickup zone or BMTC Vayu Vajra bus counter inside arrivals.
Autos near Majestic often refuse meters. Walk 200m away from the station to get a metered ride. Or use Ola Auto.
Shops on Commercial Street claim 'closing down sale' or 'factory price' year-round. Prices are inflated. Negotiate hard or compare online.
Some shops sell polyester as 'pure Bangalore silk'. Buy silk only from government emporiums (Cauvery, KSIC) for guaranteed authenticity.

localTips: Bangalore traffic is legendary — a 10 km trip can take 90 min during rush hour. Plan accordingly.
Namma Metro is expanding fast. Use it whenever possible — it's the only way to beat traffic.
The weather is pleasant year-round (15-35°C). Light layers are enough. Rains June-September.
Kannada is the local language but English and Hindi are widely understood, especially in IT areas.
Ola Auto is more reliable than flagging random autos. Meters work here, unlike Delhi.
Filter coffee > everything. Try Brahmin's Coffee Bar in Basavanagudi for the OG experience.
Bangalore shuts down early by metro standards. Most restaurants close by 11 PM, bars by 1 AM.
